title: Remove user-manual-rename guard and tmux_window_title column
description: The tmux_window_title column and user-manual-rename guard in applyTmuxTitle are now counterproductive. With the Rename Session feature, users have an explicit way to set window titles. The guard blocks title updates when the tmux window name drifts (e.g., automatic-rename). Remove the column, guard, and all related code. Design: docs/plans/2026-03-01-remove-tmux-window-title-guard-design.md
close_reason: Removed tmux_window_title column usage and user-manual-rename guard. Migration zeroes column, all Go code references removed, architecture docs updated, full build passes.
